phrases: Ready when you are, human!
Paws ready!
Standing by with maximum tail wag.
Just say the word!
All ears and ready to go.
Your loyal run buddy is ready.
Waiting for something to chase!
No job yet, but I am watching.
Systems sniffed. Everything looks good!
Ready to fetch some results.
Sniffing the notebook before we begin.
Booting up my tiny paw-powered engine.
Finding the perfect stick to start with.
One moment—preflight snoot inspection!
Warming up the paws.
Getting the run ready for zoomies.
Checking every leash, loop, and library.
The starting bark is almost here!
Point me at the first cell.
Preparing to fetch some results.
Zoomies in progress!
Off I go!
Running as fast as my little paws can!
Chasing down your results.
Fetching data at top speed!
Paws on the move!
Your job is racing along.
Full-speed tail-wag mode activated!
Bounding through the workflow!
I am on it—woof woof!
Bork! This run needs a human!
I found a pause. Come take a look!
Paws off the keyboard until you say so.
The notebook would like a little attention.
I am holding this spot for you.
Paused, alert, and accepting treats.
My ears are up. Something needs fixing.
The run stopped here to think.
I saved your place with a paw.
Ready to continue when you are.
New kernel, same determined pup.
One more lap around the notebook!
Resetting the zoomies.
Sniffing out a fresh start.
Back to the beginning, tail first!
Repacking the treats and trying again.
Fresh paws are on the way.
Restarting the chase from a clean trail.
The notebook gets another throw.
Round two—woof!
Keeping a close eye on the remote work.
I am watching your run like a good pup.
Monitoring every little paw-step.
Nothing gets past this watchdog!
Eyes on the dashboard, tail on standby.
Your run is safe with me.
Watching for updates and snack opportunities.
I will bark if anything changes.
Still watching. Still adorable.
Guarding your job one heartbeat at a time.
We did it! Tail wags for everyone!
Good job, human!
Success! Who is a clever team?
Run complete—time for celebratory zoomies!
Everything worked! Best day ever!
Fetched successfully!
No errors, only happy borks!
Paws up—we nailed it!
Mission accomplished. Treats are appropriate.
The results are in, and they are paw-some!
Uh-oh... I may have chased the wrong stick.
Something went a little ruff.
I found an error. Please do not be mad.
This was not the result I ordered.
My tail says something went wrong.
Oops! The run tripped over its own paws.
I could not fetch that one.
There is a bug, and sadly it is not chewable.
Confused pup noises...
We hit a snag. I brought my worried face.
Putting the brakes on these zoomies!
Calling all paws back home.
Stopping the chase now.
Heel, notebook! Heel!
Packing up the run as requested.
The cancellation bark has been sent.
Bringing the runaway sticks back in.
Stopping safely takes a moment.
Tail down to idle speed.
Almost stopped—one last sniff.
Run stopped. Nap mode activated.
The chase is over for now.
Cancelled! I will guard the comfy spot.
Paws parked until the next run.
No more zoomies this time.
The notebook is tucked in for a nap.
Stopped as requested. Goodnight, tiny cells.
I put the results basket down.
This run has gone to its dog bed.
Wake me for the next adventure.
